jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Stryker India
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!
